description: CompositionKhakhi coloured round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Popular rock star of the 1960s and 70s, Jim Morrison's hit number "I am the Lizard King, I can do anything" earned him the nickname Lizard King. This tantra t-shirt celebrates the singer's belief in the alter ego. If you believe in the presence of an alter ego that helps you make the best decisions in life, go ahead bring back to life the Lizard King with this tantra t-shirt, and advertise what's on your mind. Team this with cargos or jeans and fashionable lifestyle shoes or sandals from the wide range available at myntra for that unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6'; Shoulders: 18"
